name_en: 5BG288, Miu Miu new Isetan limited tote bag, official flagship, this year's absolute hit🔥 style, top-tier imported calfskin, smooth and soft surface, premium leather texture, soft yet structured body, compact size design, effortless and lazy chic, 100% head-turner on the street, hand-stitched leather logo, brand new cotton lining, two zip pockets, adjustable leather shoulder strap, 22X 14X11Cm, comes with original packaging
